chunks.text: Introducing Eli Lilly CEO Dave Ricks
How Eli Lilly discovered the GLP-1 impact on weight loss, counterfeit products from China
GLP-1 pricing and capital allocation after a breakout pharma product
Why Biotech VC has plummeted, "patent hacking" in China
Dave's health regimen: good sleep, movement, healthy diet, social relationships, reading
Unexpected impacts of GLP-1s, helping with addictions, potential mental health use cases
Thoughts on RFK Jr, Big Pharma's influence on the media, how AI empowers patients
Impact of proposed NIH cuts, explaining the "PBM boogeyman", next major pharma breakthrough
